understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle levels by maneuvering pieces so that a pushable block ends up on the goal tile(s) marked with '+', achieving the engine-reported WIN condition within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece (P) moves one grid cell per MOVE action, which corresponds to 3 pixels in the coordinate system where positions are given as [x, y] and increase right/down. If a pushable block (B) is directly adjacent in the movement direction and the space beyond it is free, the block is pushed one cell along with the selected piece; walls (#) and boundaries can prevent movement/pushing depending on their collision behavior. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces (P and S); control is switched by issuing a CLICK action targeting the exact pixel-grid coordinates of the selectable's position, after which all MOVE actions apply to the newly selected piece.
